description.value: The materials of your body resist ailments that assail the flesh. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against death effects, disease, and poison as well as to saving throws against effects that would give you the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened] conditions. Your spark of life means that you're a living creature, and you can be healed by vitality energy and harmed by void energy as normal.

publication.title: Pathfinder Lost Omens The Grand Bazaar
